title: DivideByZeroException from unguarded percentage calculations
description: Invoke-ChecklistActions.ps1 line 359 divides ($idx / $totalItems) without guarding $totalItems > 0. Script1.ps1 line 223 divides ($elapsedSeconds / $EstimatedSeconds) without guarding $EstimatedSeconds > 0. Both cause System.DivideByZeroException at runtime when the denominator is zero.
resolution: Added conditional guards: $totalItems -gt 0 before division in Invoke-ChecklistActions.ps1; $EstimatedSeconds -gt 0 before division in Script1.ps1.
detection_method: User-reported DivideByZeroException, confirmed by grep scan of all scripts
